core.title: Core Translation
core.desc: Basic t() API — the foundation of every i18n workflow.

interpolation.title: Variable Interpolation
interpolation.desc: Inject dynamic values into translations using Mustache syntax.

pluralization.title: Pluralization & ICU
pluralization.desc: Handle counts correctly with CLDR rules and ICU MessageFormat.

formatting.title: Advanced Formatting
formatting.desc: Format numbers, currency, and percentages using the built-in plugin system.

react.title: React Integration
react.desc: Seamless React hooks and components with automatic re-renders.

security.title: Security Features
security.desc: Path traversal prevention, prototype pollution guard, key sanitization.

fallback.title: Fallback Behavior
fallback.hint: This key only exists in en-US — other locales fall back to English
fallback.value: This text will always fallback to English in other languages
